label: My Orders
description: Own order history filtered to the active instrument with fill status and order IDs.

l0.notes: All checks pass. Loading/empty/error wired via TableWidget props.

1.1.note: Data from useMarketsData().ownOrders — no inline fetch ✓.

1.3.note: ownOrders filtered by scopeStrategyIds in context ✓.

1.5.note: Strategy filter narrows ownOrders via scopeStrategyIds ✓.

1.6.note: Empty scopeStrategyIds → all own orders returned ✓.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file; mock fixtures via context ✓.

l1.notes: All checks pass. Scope filtering fully wired via getStrategyIdsForScope().

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (static own orders displayed, no submission) / paper ✓ (same display behavior).

3.3.note: Human: confirm no order submission buttons in batch mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode: own orders displayed read-only. No submission in this widget.

3.6.note: No setInterval or WebSocket. Static ownOrders slice from context.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human needed for 3.3/3.4.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers — read-only own orders table ✓.

4.3.note: Human: verify order ID, side, fill status columns legible.

4.4.note: Human: confirm own orders render with correct fill/status.

4.8.note: Human: verify scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Target: all trading strategies that submit orders (crypto, tradfi, defi). Widget shows own order history filtered by scopeStrategyIds — applicable to any strategy type.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 8 tests covering loading/error/empty states, column header rendering, Fill badge for trade-type rows, BUY/SELL side labels, and venue name. See tests/widgets/markets/markets-my-orders.test.tsx

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl — uses var(--pnl-positive)/var(--pnl-negative) CSS vars only ✓.

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[10px] used throughout column cells (lines 18/26/36/56/91/102). HFT density pattern — no Tailwind token below text-xs. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.4.note:
No bare , no unlabelled , no
. Read-only table ✓.

8.5.note: Human: verify scroll at minW=6, minH=3.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density). 8.2/8.3/8.4 pass. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Own orders are scope-filtered (per-strategy), distinct from market-wide order-flow. Not mergeable.

relationships.notes: Driven by markets-controls (assetClass, orderFlowRange). Data scoped via getStrategyIdsForScope().

dataContract.notes: Mock: ownOrders filtered from generateOrderFlowData() by isOwn flag + scopeStrategyIds. Production: OMS/execution REST endpoint for own order history, optionally WebSocket for live fills.

coverage.notes: Scope-filtered by org/client/strategy. ownOrders deterministic modulo arithmetic (mock phase) — replace with real strategy ID matching when API is wired.

knownIssues: ownOrders scope-filtering uses deterministic modulo arithmetic (not true strategy-id matching) — adequate for mock phase.

findings.description: markets-my-orders-widget.tsx — ~7 user-visible strings (Order ID, Exch Time, etc.)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px).
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro = 0.625rem) at lines 18, 26, 36, 56, 91, 102.
